𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗪𝗙𝗘𝗘𝗗 | To provide users with concise, AI-generated summaries of news and information from a wide range of online sources, reducing information overload.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 HTML 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with concise, AI-generated summaries of news and information from a wide range of online sources, reducing information overload.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Multi-frequency digests (4-hourly, daily, weekly, monthly)
✅ Supports various sources: Twitter, RSS, HackerNews, Reddit, GitHub Trending
✅ Source Packs for sharing curated source bundles
✅ Content bookmarking for AI-powered deep analysis
✅ Configurable rules for content filtering and noise reduction
✅ Follow/Unfollow suggestions based on feed quality
✅ RSS and JSON Feed output for digests
✅ Multi-language support (English, Chinese)
✅ Dark/Light mode theme toggle
✅ Web dashboard (SPA) for browsing and management
✅ SQLite for storage
✅ Google OAuth for multi-user support


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 178 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 18 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ClawFeed is an AI-powered news digest service that aggregates content from various sources like Twitter and RSS feeds. It provides structured summaries at different frequencies and features a web dashboard for management and analysis, with options for standalone use or integration as a skill within other platforms.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/kevinho/clawfeed

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗘𝗦𝗖𝗥𝗖𝗣𝗬 | Displaying and controlling Android devices graphically on a desktop, enabling automation and multi-device management.  🔥 Super Hot!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Displaying and controlling Android devices graphically on a desktop, enabling automation and multi-device management.
📅 Created: Sep 2023 • Updated: Mar 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Intelligent Control with natural-language commands
✅ Automation and parallel operations across multiple devices
✅ Multi-device visual window orchestration
✅ Wireless connections with Gnirehtet reverse tethering
✅ High-performance, low-latency screen mirroring based on Scrcpy


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

🍴 631 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 41 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Escrcpy is a JavaScript-based application that provides graphical display and control of Android devices on a desktop. It leverages the scrcpy core for high-performance mirroring and integrates features like natural-language commands, multi-device management, and wireless connectivity.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗬𝗧𝗦𝗔𝗚𝗘 | Downloading YouTube videos and audio through a graphical user interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Downloading YouTube videos and audio through a graphical user interface.
📅 Created: Nov 2024 • Updated: Mar 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✅ Clean PySide6 interface
✅ Download videos in any quality
✅ Extract audio
✅ Fetch subtitles
✅ SponsorBlock integration
✅ Playlist support
✅ Auto-update yt-dlp
✅ Cross-platform support

YTSage is a modern, user-friendly YouTube downloader application built with PySide6. It leverages the power of yt-dlp to provide a clean graphical interface for downloading videos in various qualities, extracting audio, fetching subtitles, and integrating with SponsorBlock.

✅ Supports Python 3.12+
✅ Includes development tools for testing and linting

theHarvester is a Python-based OSINT tool designed for the reconnaissance phase of security assessments. It efficiently gathers emails, subdomains, hostnames, and other external information related to a domain by querying numerous public data sources.

𝗥𝗨-𝗧𝗘𝗦𝗧-𝗔𝗦𝗦𝗜𝗚𝗡𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗦 | To provide a centralized resource for individuals to find and complete technical assignments from various IT companies for skill development and portfolio building.  🌟 Rising Fast!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 HTML 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a centralized resource for individuals to find and complete technical assignments from various IT companies for skill development and portfolio building.
📅 Created: Mar 2017 • Updated: Mar 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Collection of technical assignments from IT companies
✅ Organized by company and role (e.g., Analyst, Product Analyst)
✅ Includes links to specific assignment details
✅ Indicates required technologies (e.g., Python, SQL)
✅ Aims to help users practice and build a portfolio


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 6.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 953 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

This repository serves as a curated collection of technical assignments from various IT companies, primarily aimed at helping individuals practice and improve their analytical and data-related skills. It organizes these assignments by company and role, providing links to the specific tasks and sometimes indicating the required technologies.

𝗢𝗖𝗧𝗢𝗙𝗥𝗜𝗘𝗡𝗗 | To act as a friendly, privacy-conscious AI coding assistant that helps developers with various coding tasks, integrates with multiple LLMs, and provides advanced features like sandboxing and automated error correction.  🔥 Super Hot!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To act as a friendly, privacy-conscious AI coding assistant that helps developers with various coding tasks, integrates with multiple LLMs, and provides advanced features like sandboxing and automated error correction.
📅 Created: Mar 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Open-source coding assistant
✅ Supports OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic-compatible LLM APIs
✅ Supports switching models mid-conversation
✅ Optional custom-trained autofix models for tool call and code edit failures
✅ Zero telemetry and privacy-focused
✅ Optional web search with Synthetic API or custom configuration
✅ Docker support for sandboxing and running within containers
✅ Supports custom instructions via OCTO.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md files


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 921 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 73 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 30 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Octo is an open-source, privacy-focused coding assistant that integrates with various LLM APIs. It offers features like automatic tool call and code edit handling, optional web search, and sandboxing via Docker, aiming to be a friendly and helpful coding companion.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦
